MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Nov-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS COST PLUS WORLD MARKET, LLC, WORLD MARKET MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Defendants Cost Plus World market, LLC and World Market Management Services, LLC's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is OFF CALENDAR.

On October 29, 2025, the clerk entered a dismissal of the entire action. Thus, the court orders the instant motion for judgment on the pleadings off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
